server: improve tools, remove apply_diff (#25498)

* server: improve tools, remove apply_diff

* improve edit tool

* add tools_io abstraction

* add tools_io_basic

* fix build

* move utils to class member

* add const

</details>

**macOS/iOS:**
- [macOS Apple Silicon (arm64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9957/llama-b9957-bin-macos-arm64.tar.gz)

- [macOS Intel (x64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9957/llama-b9957-bin-macos-x64.tar.gz)
- [iOS XCFramework](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9957/llama-b9957-xcframework.zip)

**Linux:**

- [Ubuntu s390x (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9957/llama-b9957-bin-ubuntu-s390x.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu x64 (Vulkan)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9957/llama-b
